uiSurface.defaultValueRule: Set value to 'foundry' UNLESS the user explicitly asks to self-host models, run OSS weights, use GPUs, or bring an existing/generic endpoint. If their prose already indicates an existing hosted, custom, OpenAI-compatible, or generic endpoint, infer 'generic_endpoint' and skip the picker.

backends.label: Microsoft Foundry
backends.description: Managed model endpoints — no GPU nodes needed. Best for standard LLM workloads.

candidateQuestionsInPriorityOrder.askOnlyIf: user has expressed a model preference

forbidden: presenting a stale fixed list of model families
asking the user to restate use case or data sources they already provided

backends.label: KAITO on AKS
backends.description: Run supported open-source model presets on GPU nodes in your own cluster. Full control over model weights.

groundingTool.queryPattern: user's requested model/family, or '*' to browse
groundingTool.rule: Use returned matches as the current KAITO-supported preset list; do not rely on memory or a static list.

candidateQuestionsInPriorityOrder.askOnlyIf: model is known and SKU matters

questionPolicy.fallbackIfNoMatch: Explain that the model is not in the current KAITO preset catalog; ask whether to switch to another supported preset or use a generic_endpoint.

constraints.gpuCapacity: Treat GPU sizes as user constraints until live regional capacity APIs are available.

backends.label: Existing or generic inference endpoint
backends.description: Bring an existing hosted, custom, or OpenAI-compatible inference endpoint.

forbidden: asking the user to paste secret values
rejecting an endpoint because it is not Microsoft Foundry or KAITO
asking the user to paste secret values
